titleStmt.title: SII 28.255: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 255. (A.R. No. 409 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, north wall.

p.hi: Kṛishṇadēva-mahārāya Śaka 1435, Bhāva, Siṁha śu. 11, Wednesday, Svāti-Irregular.

summary.p: Records that Eṟamāñchi Akkit-Timmaya-nāyakkar, who is invested with various titles like mahā-nāyaṅkaran, āchāriyan etc., founded of Paṉadalai, (residential quarter) in the nattam complex of Āṟagaḷūr, which was part of dēvadāna-chaṟumāniyam (sarva-mānyam) of dēvadānam in the name of the God (tiru-nāmattu-kkāṇi) Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-tambīrāṉār of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūrkūṟṟam in Magadai-maṇḍalam which had been deserted and got ruined and there after arranged for its rehabilitation. To encourage its repopulation, he stipulated that each house-holder of the (kaikkōḷar) who settled in the village need pay as a consolidated payment (kaṭṭu-kkuttagai) only 3 paṇam per plough and paṇam per loom taṟi (further details lost), in lieu of all the various levies, echchōṟu, vari-chōṟu, āḷ-amañji and such, as had already been imposed and which may in future also be imposed with the name of Tuḻakkaṇa-nāyakkan-pēṭṭai as was the practice in that nāḍu (some portions of the record have been lost).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍa
leśvaran bhāṣaikkut
tappum Irāyarkaṇḍan muvar Irāyar
kaṇṭan metinimīcurakaṇṭan kaṭ
ṭāri cāḷuvan kiṟuṭṭiṇa tevamahā
irāyar pradhuvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakā
ppatam 1000 4 100 3 10 5 Itiṉmel cellāniṉṟa pāvasam
vaṟcarattu ciṅka nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣat
tu Ekāteciyum putavāramum peṟṟa coti
nāḷ śrīmanmahānāyaṅkācācāriyan bhāṣaikku
ttappum nāyaṅkar kaṇṭan naraḷoka kaṇṭan
campuvarāya cavuttaraṅkavayiri yātavarāya sthāpānā cā
riyan cāṭikkāṟar kaṇṭan śrīmatu Eṟamāñci Akki
ttimmaya nāyakkar makatai maṇṭalattu Āṟṟūrk kūṟṟattu
Āṟakaḷūr nayiṉār tirukkāmicuramuṭaiya tampirāṉār tirunāmat
tukkāṇiāna tevatānam caṟuva māniyam Āṟakaḷūr nattattiṉ vaṭakkil natta
m paṉattalaip pāḻākaiyil Iṉta nattam Immaṭi tulukkaṇa nāyakkaṉ peṭṭai
Eṉṟu kaṭṭi Itukku Ellai kiḻakku Āṟṟukku meṟku teṟku muṭṭaik kiṇa
ṟṟukku teṟkkil karaikku vaṭakku meṟku turkātevi karaikku kiḻakku Āṟṟu
kku teṟkku Inta nānkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa Inta nattattil vanteṟum kai
ykkoḷarkkum Iyeccoṟu varicoṟu Āḷ Amañci nāṭṭukkuḷ piṟak
kum paḻavari putuvari kūṭuvaṟkam Araivarici Iṉimel piṟakkum vari Uḷpa

ṭa maṉaiyāṅ kaṭṭu kuttakaiyāka taṟikku muṉṟu paṇamum yerukku muṉṟusome lines after this are not traceable.
potuka Ivai vāṇakovaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu IActualy a line or two after this has been lost.
Itu karukālamaṭaiyānRead tirukālamuṭaiyārkalveṭṭu
Digital edition of SII 28.255 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
